content.text: Read /Users/mukuls/.claude/spawn-prompts/prompt-dispatch-td-098-20260530-191958.md in full and execute every instruction in it. td-098: audit Squirrel coalesce/undo granularity and draft an enforcement rule. Do NOT activate any rule — drafts only, for my review.
Reading the dispatch prompt and scoping the audit. I'll trace how undo transactions are coalesced across async-generator boundaries.

Audit findings written. The async-generator transaction coalescing is the S4/S5 severity question — whether a single user gesture produces 1 undo frame or N. I've captured the analysis and three candidate backstops.

td-098 work-product is ready for your review. Nothing is activated — these are drafts only, per your standing rule.

1. **Audit** — `~/dev/generated-docs/audits/squirrel/coalesce-undo-granularity-audit-2026-05-30.md`. Open question for you: whether async-generator transactions should be 1 frame or N drives S4 vs S5 severity.
2. **Enforcement-rule drafts** awaiting your review (not activated):
   - `…/coalesce-undo-granularity-rule-DRAFT-2026-05-30.md` (path-scoped `.claude/rules/squirrel` rule)
   - `…/coalesce-undo-granularity-eslint-sketch-2026-05-30.md` (ESLint custom-rule backstop)

Say the word and I'll wire in the rule + lint and start working through the remaining td-100 severities.
